title: Ontario Building More Electric Vehicle Charging Stations
content: Ontario is investing $63 million to build over 1,300 new EV charging ports in small and medium-sized communities across the province, enhancing support for EV adoption outside large urban areas. These chargers, located at 270 sites, will help drivers in underserved regions, including 190 ports in northern Ontario. Part of Ontarioâ€™s broader plan to expand EV infrastructure, this initiative supports the province's growing EV and battery manufacturing sector and includes additional measures like an Ultra-Low Overnight Electricity Price Plan to reduce charging costs for EV owners.
author: Analysts Account
